description: A perfect blend of comfort and style, the fila Ronin flip flop comes with a fabric twill strap and a cushioned footbed, that will never make you want to slide out of them.UpperFabric twill straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in placeCushioned and textured PU footbed with brand name printed on the heel and Bella Italia on the lateral toe regionOutsoleTPR outsole with brand name styled lugs for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
